basics.name: Vimal Teja Manne
basics.summary: Senior Business Transformation Analyst with extensive experience leading and optimizing large-scale projects for process efficiency and business growth. Proven track record reducing turnaround time by 30% through process re-engineering and delivering actionable insights via data analysis and visualization.

bullets: Act as product owner for Commander Payments and Petro Gateway modernization, owning scope, prioritization, and delivery outcomes across onboarding, MOP configuration, MID freeze, AID routing, and admin capabilities

Elicit and document requirements, converting them into Jira epics and user stories with clear acceptance criteria, and define non-functional requirements such as security, auditability, and performance
Run backlog grooming, sprint planning, and release readiness with engineering and QA, track dependencies and RAID items, and drive timely decision-making to unblock delivery

Align stakeholders across Product, Sales, Operations, and Legal/Compliance, shape access control and data visibility policies for site configuration and T-logs, and communicate roadmap and release impacts
Lead UAT and rollout gates, validate outcomes using test cases, transaction logs, and site telemetry, and coordinate defect triage through to production sign-off

Build and maintain operational dashboards in Excel and Power BI to monitor site health and rollout readiness, including last-received-status, terminal inventory, and exclusion lists for major chains, major oils, and lab/test terminals

Led a process re-engineering project within the platform enhancement initiative, applying process improvement methodologies to streamline mortgage application workflows and reduce turnaround time by 30%
Conducted feasibility and gap analysis to drive project decisions, enhancing processing speed by 20% through business transformation strategies
Implemented a Requirement Traceability Matrix (RTM) for the Digital Mortgage platform, aligning deliverables with project goals to enhance accountability and support change management

Collaborated with cross-functional teams including design, development, and QA using Jira to streamline functional requirements and leverage user stories, achieving a 25% reduction in project completion time

Performed data analysis using SQL and Excel, leveraging Power BI and Tableau for data visualization to deliver insights and improve mortgage processing efficiency by 20%, increasing customer satisfaction by 15%

Coordinated system integration testing and user acceptance testing (UAT) for the digital mortgage platform enhancement, aligning outputs with business requirements to reduce post-launch defects by 20%
Led agile practices to enhance a mobile banking app, achieving a 20% reduction in development time through iterative sprints, supporting lean project management and continuous stakeholder feedback
Utilized process improvement and change management techniques, leveraging UML diagrams with MS Visio to streamline workflows and achieve a 15% increase in efficiency
Optimized user story management with Jira to enhance team effectiveness, contributing to captured project deliverables and timely completion across agile frameworks
Managed stakeholder relationships to create comprehensive KPI reports and metrics for a mobile banking app enhancement, resulting in a 20% increase in funding and resource allocation
Led business analysis and requirements gathering, reducing scope changes by 25% to optimize project outcomes
Developed the business requirement document (BRD) with detailed use cases for last-mile delivery optimization, reducing scope gaps by 25% and accelerating project delivery by 15%
Managed change management initiatives including risk analysis with cross-functional teams, enhancing project transition success through effective stakeholder communication and training

education.degree: Master of Science, Information Technology and Management
Bachelor of Technology, Computer Science and Engineering

certifications: ECBA: Entry Certificate in Business Analysis
achievements: Reduced turnaround time by 30% through process re-engineering at Amex
Streamlined team projects, achieving a 25% reduction in completion time using Agile methodologies
Increased customer satisfaction by 15% through data-driven mortgage processing improvements
